title: Through The Ringer feat . Zillick
lyrics: I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud Smokin' fire, weed, smokin' on the bud OG, granddad, diesel, sticky, icky Got these bitches licky, sticky, icky all on my stick Got me itching for a Friday night Nightclubs, hot tubs, me and Brian B Fuckin' up everything you see Yup, that's right, see me Trespassin', playin' ball 2 a.m., parkin' lot Zombies all around me, everywhere they found G, wait, hold up, that's not my scene If you know what I mean Mr. Cat, got your tongue, won't see me Posting, following, needy, whiny bitches Kids lightin' up the scene Time to ring up through the mud Bitch, I'm out for blood You know what's up, fuck around, find out Don't need to clap guns, we just here to make fun Chokin' on a dick pic, you chose a dick Can't bust me quick What, you think I'm a bitch? Come here, boy, take a lesson Satisfy all the things you're gonna see Mini skirts, booty shorts, Mr. Cat approves Ain't a positive mark of the cat Plus one, plus size Assets make my eyes wide Hoping every girl get some time With this ding-dong, ring the doorbell Here to drop an invite to the spot Hope you're nice and tight I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been spilling all this for you All my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fuckin' night I survive this life Cause I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been through it all with you Spilling my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fuckin' night I survive this life Crawled out the gutter, no crown on my head Just the weight of the world and the words that I bled Told me I was finished, I was better off dead Now I write a holy scripture in the lines that I've said Fight demons in the dark where light won't reach Turn pain into lessons that the streets can't teach Never broke my soul, though they cracked my frame Still I rise, still I stand, still I chant my name I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been through it all with you Spilling my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fuckin' night I survive this life Cause I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been through it all with you Spilling my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fuckin' night I survive this life Love cut deep, saw the blade in the hand Close as one, switch up, couldn't understand Shared food, shared pain, shared the same damn plan Now I'm standing in the storm, so I'm stronger, man Trust broke, but my hope never fully died Kept my circle like a razor cause the fates aside But times ain't enough when the soul ain't right So I built up my own tribe in the dead of the night When the tears dried up, I became the poop Every scar on my skin is a line of truth To the losses, the crosses, the endless fight I still stand tall every fuckin' night Through these losses, crosses, the endless fight I still stand tall every motherfuckin' night Cause I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been through it all with you Spilling my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fucking night I survive this life Cause I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud I've been through it all with you Spilling my blood, fear, fight, fight Yeah, that's my right Every fuckin' night I survive this life Took my life, bitch, yeah Took my soul, bitch, yeah Break me down, bitch, yeah Let me go homie girl, homie girl, homie girl Homie girl, homie girl, homie girl, homie girl Homie girl, homie girl, homie girl, homie girl

lyricsSegments.text: I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud
Smokin' fire, weed, smokin' on the bud OG, granddad, diesel, sticky, icky
Got these bitches licky, sticky, icky all on my stick
Got me itching for a Friday night Nightclubs, hot tubs, me and Brian B
Fuckin' up everything you see Yup, that's right, see me
Trespassin', playin' ball 2 a.m., parkin' lot
Zombies all around me, everywhere they found G, wait, hold up, that's not my scene
If you know what I mean Mr. Cat, got your tongue, won't see me
Posting, following, needy, whiny bitches Kids lightin' up the scene
Time to ring up through the mud Bitch, I'm out for blood
You know what's up, fuck around, find out Don't need to clap guns, we just here to make fun
Chokin' on a dick pic, you chose a dick Can't bust me quick

With this ding-dong, ring the doorbell Here to drop an invite to the spot
Hope you're nice and tight
I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud
I've been spilling all this for you All my blood, fear, fight, fight

that I bled Told me I was finished, I was better off dead

Turn pain into lessons that the streets can't teach
Never broke my soul, though they cracked my frame
Still I rise, still I stand, still I chant my name

When the tears dried up, I became the poop Every scar on my skin is a line of truth
To the losses, the crosses, the endless fight I still stand tall every fuckin' night
Through these losses, crosses, the endless fight I still stand tall every motherfuckin' night
Cause I've been through the ringer, I've been through the mud
